/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/ui/RenderWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/gris/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/ui/SettingsWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/VolumeVisualisation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/src/ui/LoadDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/include/ui/moc_MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/include/ui/moc_RenderWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/include/ui/moc_SettingsWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/praxis_ex.dir/include/ui/moc_LoadDialog.cpp.o -o praxis_ex.app/Contents/MacOS/praxis_ex -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtOpenGLWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGLWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
